description: A global shift policy document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/global_shift_policy.txt. Read this policy and configure three regional 'Follow the Sun' email notification profiles in OpManager (Settings > Notifications > Notification Profiles). You must create the APAC, EMEA, and AMER profiles with the exact names, email addresses, and strictly restricted time windows (not 24x7) specified in the policy. Credentials: admin / Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
